$comment: 0.6.x command: invoke via Node directly. 0.7.0+ will switch to bin/kongcode-launch (Unix) / bin/kongcode-launch.cmd (Windows) once CI ships per-platform SEA binaries to bin/kongcode-<os>-<arch>. The launcher scripts already fall back to this Node invocation when no SEA binary is present, so the transition can be staged: ship binaries first, then flip the command field, no breaking change.
